title: OptiFine & FPS | ButterFine
description: Optimization/FPS and quality of life. A client-like performance pack and now OptiFine alternative - up to 4x FPS Boost
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)

### If you wish to get this pack on MojoLauncher please check out [Butterium Mobile](https://modrinth.com/modpack/butterium-mojo)

# What does this pack do?

ButterFine is a **client-like modpack** that makes your game _**as smooth as possible**_ by *(in some cases)* **QUADRUPLING your FPS** allowing for **smooth** gameplay on **even the lowest of hardware**. In some cases this pack **even performs better than both Lunar and Feather**.

ButterFine is the **official fork of [Butterium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/butterium)** that adds **OptiFine features** ontop of the **amazing pack** that Butterium already is, therefore this pack should be as **optimized** as can be for everyone.

ButterFine also **integrates** each mod into **it's very own custom-made ButterUI** so you **shouldn't ever see an ugly config file or bloated menu** with thousands of options **ever again**.

To put it simply, we achieve **perfection** with **performance, quality of life and gameplay** all in one pack with **less than 40 mods**.

## **Please view [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/butterfine/gallery) to see more** UI, HUD and features

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38c1452c3e3bbfca3eea7bb1c8e545bb3476693e_0.webp)

^ *Low-resolution image of Butterium when minimized to a smaller window*

## Features

⚡ **Lightning fast performance** - ButterFine has comparable performance to the top performance packs on this platform without being a bloated RAM hog, in *some* cases we **out-perform these packs** *(especially in multiplayer)*

🎮 **Cool gameplay/multiplayer features** - We have features like **freecam, fullbright, version-switching, account switching, resource/shader pack browsing, voice chat** and more to ensure that you have **more than high FPS**

⚙️ **Custom settings and GUI's** - We use FancyMenu to **fine tune** our GUIs and **integrate** mods **using our own ButterUI design language**

🎮 **Custom HUD** - We integrate features like keystrokes, time, armor display, co-ordinates and more into ButterFine's HUD, you can drag everything around with ease

📆 **Regular updates** - Us at ELTE Studios are dedicated to **bug-squashing** and meeting user needs by **adding new features**

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQEfEOx8/images/7b357bea92fb0237aa208c1071a6451a637ca670.png)

^ *Our "Quick Settings" window that is visible on the pause screen and can be moved wherever*

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQEfEOx8/images/caa4c5ba753e5276821bd56b167d0bc0e3e999d4.png)

^ *Fullscreeen 1080p version of the Title Screen on GUI Scale 3*

## Why is this modpack to be compared to a client?

As you can see, we refer to **ButterFine as a *Client-like* modpack**. Lets explain **why**.

1) **Many** of our users have **switched** from using **popular clients to** using **Butterium**

2) The devs make this pack feel as **custom made** for **you** as possible _(e.g **draggable window**s, **onboarding**)_

3) We're working to make this pack **integrate each mod** to **_perfection_**, from **custom menus**, **keybinds** and **commands**, to completely **custom mods** themselves *(coming soon)*.

4) We **plan to expand** to a **custom launcher** in the **future**

## Credits

Most UI's were created using the **amazing tool** that is **[FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) by [Keksuccino](https://modrinth.com/user/Keksuccino)**, this is amazing for modpack creators as it allows **custom** designs within Minecraft.

**Some** configs and .jar files were taken/based from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), but **not many**.

## Where do I report bugs/request features?

If you encounter any **incompatibilities, missing features or bugs** whilst using this modpack please report them to the ELTE Studios official Discord linked below **↓**

![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)
